title: 10th Anniversary of Evangelion Set
wikitext:
[]: 10th Anniversary of Evangelion Set             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jul 02, 2006 11:37 pm http://www.evamonkey.com/2006/06/closer-look-at-tenth-anniversary-set.php http://www.evamonkey.com/2006/05/evangelion-10th-anniversary-box-set.php You've probably read about it already, and I'm curious to know what people think about this re-re-re-release of Evangelion on DVD. Do you want it? Do you think it's stupid? Do you feel it's unnecessary?

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Mon Jul 03, 2006 12:24 am I want it (if only I could buy it) I find the price too high, these guys must be searching for fat money :P I can't find it stupid by any means, well it's not unessesary for some collection freaks. It could be some ultimate eva source for those who don't posses it......but still, eva platinum thinpack along with D&R + EoE two pack come into half the 10th an.edition price, so i keep this out.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon Jul 03, 2006 3:14 am Well as you said EM it's a re-re-re-release of Eva, so probably unecessary.. But i wanna buy it! *why do i get the feeling that most of people will consider it unecessarcy but they are gonna buy it?*

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Mon Jul 03, 2006 3:31 am Fucking hell, already? How long has Eva Platinum been out again? Thank God it won't be seeing a PAL release thus I won't have an opportunity to act like the consumer whore I am.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Mon Jul 03, 2006 6:17 am Well seeing as I'm in the UK I won't be able to get it without importing, so I've already pre ordered it from Amazon for importing. It was about Â£109 ($202) altogether from there for me so I am saving quite a lot from the recomended price. I dont think the set is unnecessary as it'll most likely be a good collectors item, I do think it's a bit bad of them to release it now after just releasing the thinpack set last year.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Mon Jul 03, 2006 10:10 am Do I want it? Yes. Do I think it is stupid? Yes. Do you feel it's unnecessary? Yes. Am I going to buy it anyway? Yes, I am stupid like that. (Plus I do have the money to spend on it. The only thing that would stop me from buying it is if that moronic Karowu saying is what they put on the jacket.)

[]:             Quote Post by DsirinWsdm » Mon Jul 03, 2006 11:04 am Does the world need yet another version of Eva? Hell, No! :evil: Have I reserved mine, anyway? Yep, Amazon for $169! :oops: Do I really need yet another version of Eva? No. :shock: Will I buy it again when itâ€™s finally released on Blu-ray/HD-DVD? Of course! :cry: Why? Because Iâ€™m weak and I donâ€™t know any better. :?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 03, 2006 11:40 am I wouldn't be surprised if ADV understands that they can slap "Evangelion" on a box and charge $100+ and we're too stupid not to buy it.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Mon Jul 03, 2006 12:23 pm What glorious ADV extras can we expect this time? AMW interpration of the series? More Matt Greenfield and Sean McCoy blather?

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Strangelove » Mon Jul 03, 2006 12:35 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I wouldn't be surprised if ADV understands that they can slap "Evangelion" on a box and charge $100+ and we're too stupid not to buy it.

[]:             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Mon Jul 03, 2006 1:07 pm Man, talk about milking the same cow over and over again... :roll: In fact, ADV Films are milking the same Evangelion cow so much, that the milk is starting to get bloody. We don't need another version of Evangelion so shortly after the Platinum versions were already released.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Strangelove » Mon Jul 03, 2006 1:16 pm Trowa_Ayanami wrote: Man, talk about milking the same cow over and over again... :roll: In fact, ADV Films are milking the same Evangelion cow so much, that the milk is starting to get bloody. We don't need another version of Evangelion so shortly after the Platinum versions were already released.

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Mon Jul 03, 2006 4:44 pm Bah! If only I wasn't 11 years old!

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Mon Jul 03, 2006 7:46 pm As I just mentioned over in the news post thread, this is pretty ridiculous. Basically, ADV is just putting the same video extras from the Platinum set on the 10th Anniversiary set.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jul 03, 2006 7:49 pm I remember hearing a taped conforence with Mat on youtube.com or some where else that said that the PLatinum edition would be the last edition produced.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 03, 2006 9:56 pm Timesplitter 01 wrote: I remember hearing a taped conforence with Mat on youtube.com or some where else that said that the PLatinum edition would be the last edition produced.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Mon Jul 03, 2006 10:04 pm I rewatched the Tekkoshocon panel, and was dissapointed to hear that Greenfield was referring to "physical extras" that he couldn't annonce. I was hoping he was referring to video extras. Drat.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 03, 2006 11:08 pm SEELE 08 wrote: Lets hope that has nothing to do with Tiffany Grant in a plug suit. *shudders*

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Jul 03, 2006 11:57 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: SEELE 08 wrote: Lets hope that has nothing to do with Tiffany Grant in a plug suit. *shudders*

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 04, 2006 12:31 am DatDude wrote: You dog you
